meta.name: Three-VM node-ready
meta.description: Install Node.js 22.x on host, agent, and visitor VMs and point @lamalibre at the Feria dev registry.

sections.label: Install Node.js 22.x and configure Feria registry

steps.label: Install Node.js + Feria registry on host
steps.bash:
set -euo pipefail
if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "npm already available ($(npm --version))"
else
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  apt-get install -y nodejs
fi
GATEWAY="$(ip route | awk '/default/{print $3; exit}')"
if [ -z "${GATEWAY}" ]; then GATEWAY="192.168.2.1"; fi
printf '@lamalibre:registry=http://%s:4873\n' "${GATEWAY}" | tee /root/.npmrc /home/ubuntu/.npmrc >/dev/null
